name: plgg-poc6-classify
description: PoC 6 of the plggpress confidence-collection fleet: non-tree file classification — tag/link grouping over the tree-shaped corpus, presented as THREE comparable navigation variants (tag facets, link/backlink graph, multi-dimensional filter). A pure query-command parser drives each variant's search deterministically (headless-replayable); the Realtime voice session emits the same queries as a bonus.
author: qmu
